app.name: Communio
app.tagline: The Catholic parish and community platform

status.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
status.offline: You are offline. Changes will sync when you reconnect.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.search_placeholder: Search by name, category, or city…
organizations.discover_body: Search for ministries, apostolates, and Catholic organizations to join.
organizations.no_results_hint: Try a different name or category

messages.title: Messages
messages.no_messages_hint: Start a conversation with another member.
messages.premium_body: Send private messages to any Communio member. Available to supporters of the mission.

chat.members_only_hint: Join this group to participate in chat.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.empty_body: When someone likes your post or responds to your prayer, you will see it here.
notifications.settings_description: Control which notifications you receive. You can turn off any type at any time.
notifications.type_comments_desc: When someone comments on your post
notifications.type_parish_desc: When your parish posts an announcement
notifications.type_prayer_desc: When someone prays for your intention
notifications.type_messages_desc: When someone sends you a message
notifications.type_confession_desc: Gentle reminders for the Confession Tracker
